message:
fix: address round 4 review issues — 8 fixes with tests

Production code fixes:
- Add .catch() to fire-and-forget subscribeSessionEvents in constructor
- Fix stale subscription after /clear: add updateSessionId() to spawner,
  called by SessionController on clear to resubscribe to new topic
- Use parseBusMessage instead of raw JSON.parse in subscribeSessionEvents
  for structural validation (prevents crash on malformed messages)
- Add double-subscription guard (idempotent subscribeSessionEvents)
- Replace dynamic import with static import in agent-process.test.ts

New tests:
- SessionController wires subscribeSessionEvents callback to bus.emitEvent
- /clear command calls updateSessionId on spawner
- Multiple agents' events arrive at single subscribeSessionEvents
- subscribeSessionEvents idempotency (second call is no-op)
- updateSessionId resubscribes to new session topic
- sessionEvents round-trip test in topics.test.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
